issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Migrate Turborepo to moon with affected CI
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly produces .moon/workspace.yml plus per-project moon.yml files with inputs/outputs/deps and uses moon ci, whereas baseline misses the project-level config and the moon ci command.

scenarios.name: Pin Node.js and pnpm versions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes .moon/toolchain.yml with the documented node.version and pnpm.version structure, while baseline falls back to .nvmrc or volta instead of moon's toolchain.
